title: Richly Roasted Syrian Rice Pilaf
description: A briny, chewy, and cozy Syrian dish featuring stir-fry vegetables and roasted rice, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This egg-free friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine mesh strainer until the water runs clear, then drain and set aside.
Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the chopped carrots and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the rice to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the water, salt, black pepper, cumin, and paprika to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for 18 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it sit, covered, for 5 minutes.
